name: Wind Electric Power Generation
rationale: Cleanest constraint sheet in set (9.5, only grid-forming firmware cert as low mitigable) + ODI 5.75 with time-boxed catalyst (DE inertia-service prequal opens Jan 2026). Job coverage 7.5 (4 YES + 4 partial). Vestas/SGRE OEM packages limit incumbent vulnerability (4.0).
